ai_summary: Lemon Tree Hotels announced a strategic domestic expansion by signing a new 70-room managed hotel in Jorhat, Assam, deepening its commitment to India's high-growth regional markets. Concurrently, the company de-flagged its 112-room managed hotel in Dubai, resulting in an immediate net reduction of 42 rooms in its operational portfolio. The unexplained exit from Dubai and the net decrease in managed rooms present a mild red flag, warranting further scrutiny into the rationale behind the international divestment and its impact on the company's overall portfolio strategy.
